introduce.title: What Is the AI Brow Tint Generator?
introduce.label: Introduction
introduce.description: AI Brow Tint Generator is a virtual brow tint try-on tool that lets you preview brow tint shades and before-and-after results on your own photo before visiting a brow artist or salon.

items.title: Virtual Brow Tint Try-On
items.description: Preview brow tint shades without using any products. Our AI simulates professional brow tinting results so you can see your new look before committing.

items.title: Realistic AI Brow Tint Results
items.description: Face-aware AI blends tint color with your natural brow shape and skin tone for photorealistic brow tinting previews.

items.title: Brow Tint Color Matching
items.description: Preview different tinted brow gel shades — from soft taupe to deep espresso — before committing to find the best brow tint for your look.

items.title: Lash and Brow Tint Preview
items.description: See combined lash and brow tint styles in one preview for a complete eye-framing look that enhances your natural features.

benefits.title: Why Choose Our AI Brow Tint Generator
benefits.label: Benefits
benefits.description: Fast, private, and realistic previews for confident brow tinting decisions.

items.title: Lightning Fast & 100% Online
items.description: Generate multiple brow tint looks from one photo in seconds, 100% online. No appointments or products needed to preview your perfect brow tint.

items.title: Privacy First
items.description: Photos are processed securely and never stored permanently. Your brow tint previews are generated privately.

items.title: Professional Salon Quality
items.description: Download salon-ready brow tint previews to show your brow artist exactly the shade and style you want.

usage.title: How to Use AI Brow Tint Generator
usage.description: Get a realistic brow tint preview in four simple steps:

items.title: Upload a Clear Photo
items.description: Use a front-facing photo with good lighting and your eyebrows clearly visible so the AI can map your brow shape accurately.

items.title: Choose Your Brow Tint Style
items.description: Pick from tinted brow gel, brow lamination and tint, professional brow tint, or brow code tint options.

items.title: Generate Your Brow Tint Preview
items.description: AI creates realistic brow tint before and after images in seconds, blending color with your natural brow shape.

items.title: Download and Share
items.description: Save high-res brow tint before and after photos to show your brow artist or stylist at your next appointment.

features.title: Key Features of the AI Brow Tint Generator
features.description: A complete virtual brow tint studio for shades, styles, and before-and-after comparisons.

items.title: Tinted Brow Gel Shade Matching

items.title: Brow Lamination and Tint

items.title: Before and After Comparison

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: FAQs about the AI brow tint generator, photo tips, and how to get the best brow tinting results.
faq.tip: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our support team

items.question: Is this AI Brow Tint Generator free to use?
items.answer: Yes. You can try the AI brow tint generator online with a free trial to preview multiple brow tint styles and shades.

items.question: How realistic are the brow tint previews?
items.answer: The AI blends each brow tint shade with your photo for a realistic preview that accounts for your natural brow shape, skin tone, and lighting.

items.question: What kind of photos work best?
items.answer: For the best results, upload a clear, front-facing photo with good lighting and your eyebrows clearly visible. Avoid photos where your face is covered by sunglasses, masks, or hair. A neutral expression works best.

items.question: Can I preview different tinted brow gel shades?
items.answer: Yes. Try a range of tinted brow gel shades — from soft taupe and warm brown to deep espresso — and compare them side by side to find the best tinted brow gel for your look.

items.question: What is the difference between brow tint and tinted brow gel?
items.answer: A professional brow tint is a semi-permanent dye applied at a salon that lasts several weeks. A tinted brow gel is a daily cosmetic product that adds color and hold. The AI brow tint generator can preview both styles so you can decide which is right for you.

items.question: Is my photo data secure?
items.answer: We take privacy seriously. Your uploaded photos are processed securely for the brow tint generation purpose and are not stored permanently or shared with third parties.

items.question: Can I preview brow lamination and tint together?
items.answer: Yes. Select the brow lamination and tint style to see brushed-up, sculpted brows combined with your chosen tint shade in one realistic preview.

items.question: How do I find the best brow tint for my skin tone?
items.answer: Upload your photo and try multiple shades. The AI considers your skin tone and natural brow color to generate realistic previews, helping you find the best brow tint match before visiting a brow artist.

items.question: Can I show my AI brow tint preview to my brow artist?
items.answer: Yes. Download your brow tint before and after preview and show it to your brow artist or salon to communicate exactly the shade and style you want.

items.question: How long does it take to generate a brow tint preview?
items.answer: Most brow tint previews are ready in seconds, depending on image size and traffic.

items.question: Do I need to install anything?
items.answer: No. The AI brow tint generator runs entirely in your browser — no downloads or installations needed.

photoGuidelines.title: Photo Guidelines for Best Results
photoGuidelines.suitableDescription: Please upload a clear, front-facing photo of your face with your eyebrows clearly visible. Avoid covering your brows with hair or accessories.
photoGuidelines.unsuitableDescription: Please don't upload photos taken from the side, in low light, or where your eyebrows are covered by hair, sunglasses, or any other objects. Also, please avoid cartoon images.
